corrected_fields.summary: The New York Fed publishes a calendar listing scheduled economic data releases for April 2026 including CPI, PPI, GDP, employment reports, ISM surveys, and various Fed research publications, all timed to Eastern Time. This is a navigation/listing page containing only future scheduled release dates and times; no actual data or analysis is provided.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This calendar page has no standalone research value for RAG applications. It serves only as a scheduling reference. Market participants and researchers would need to return to this page repeatedly to check for updates or navigate to individual data release pages when data is actually published.
